name: Jamf: Group Administrators Targeted Edges
description: Targeted Filtering Query, display nodes with edges between 'GROUP_ADMINISTRATORS' and 'UPDATE' or 'GROUP_ADMINISTRATORS' and other nodes that start with 'SOL'
query:
MATCH p=(s)-[]->(t)
WHERE s.name STARTS WITH 'GROUP_ADMINISTRATORS' AND t.name STARTS WITH 'UPDATE' OR s.name STARTS WITH 'GROUP_ADMINISTRATORS' AND t.name STARTS WITH 'SOL'
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
